blocks.content: Savannah pulled Daisy away from the fire at some point — nothing dramatic, just a hand on her arm and a look that meant come with me.

blocks.speaker: Savannah
blocks.content: I've known since December. The way you two have been with each other — you're holding something back. Something specific.

blocks.speaker: Savannah
blocks.content: Only to me. I've been watching you two since we were fourteen.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: I keep thinking it's going to happen and then the moment passes.

blocks.speaker: Savannah
blocks.content: I do. I know the way he looks at you, Daisy. I've been watching it for years. Tonight is different.

blocks.speaker: Savannah
blocks.content: Like he made a decision. Like he walked into this field already knowing.
Daisy looked across the fire to where Kit was talking to Eli. Like he felt it, he glanced up. Found her. Looked away first — but not fast.

blocks.speaker: Savannah
blocks.content: I'm just going to stand right here and watch it happen.
